nasb.text: My heart has been smitten like grass and has withered away, Indeed, I forget to eat my bread.

esv.text: My heart is struck down like grass and has withered; I forget to eat my bread.

cnv.text: 我的心受創傷， 好像草一般枯乾， 以致我連飯也忘了吃。

ccb.text: 我的心被摧残，如草枯萎， 以致我不思饮食。

csbs.text: 我的心如牧草，受摧残而枯干， 以致我忘记了吃饭。
